description.initial: You're deep in the ocean now, far from any land. The water here takes on an almost luminous quality, hints of a faint natural glow from sea creatures visible even in daylight. Schools of fish dart beneath your vessel, and the occasional larger shape moves in the depths, mysterious and ancient.
description.return: The north-central ocean. Life teems beneath the surface.
description.atmospheric: The water seems to glow from within. You feel small against the ocean's vastness.

north.blockedMessage: The floating city of Nephelia cannot be reached from the water.

interactables.name: Fish Schools
interactables.examineText: Enormous schools of silver fish move beneath the surface, their coordinated movements creating patterns that seem almost intelligent.
